titleStmt.title: SII 5.987: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 987. (A.R. No. 122 of 1896). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanaikavīra dvaṁndrakulamaṅgalapradīpa madhurāpurīmahendra keraḷakulakāḷāndhakāradivākaracoḷavaṁśavārirāśivāḍabānalalaṅkāpati kāḷakūṭakadanakāḷakaṇṭha
karṇāṭakarikaḷabhakaṇṭhīrava kṣemāsuravidāraṇa narasiṁha �ṭhakavamśavaiśvānara jayantamaṅgalapurādhīśvara vīragaṇḍagopāla bhujaṅgavihaṅgarāja kāñcīpuraviracita sāmrājyābhiṣeka ga
ṇapatigandhagajakūṭapākala bahuvidhavairidurggabhaṅjana praṇatarājasthāpanācārya tribhuvanarājādhirājaparameśvara śrīvikramapāṇḍyade var Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil
tāṉattārkku Innāyaṉārkkum veyaṉatoḷinācciyārkkum namperāl kaṭṭiṉa vikramapā ṇṭiyaṉsantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittanivantaṅkaḷukku rājādhi
[rāja]vaḷanāṭṭu nakaram Āṉa coḻapurattil pottakappaṭikkup payir Aṭaippāṉa nilattile Irupatiṟṟuveli nilam Eḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Āṭi mātamutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom I
ppaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ippaṭikkut tiruveḻuttuc cātti Ivai tirumantiraolai Eḻuttu
raiyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 3 100 9 carikaikkoṭṭaiyil kulacekaraṉ maṇṭapattu Eḻuntaruḷiirukka Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyārkkum veyaṉatoḷinācciyārkkum 3 vatu Āṉi
mātamutal kaṭṭiṉa vikrama pāṇṭiyaṉ santi Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi cāttupapaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nittanivantaṅkaḷukku Aṭaitta Ūrkaḷukku 3 vatu ḷ 3 100 6 10 l tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku Iṭṭaniṉaippi
ṉpaṭiRead āvatu.8 vatu Āṭimāta mutal peṟa variyil kaḻitta Ūrkaḷukku terippu coḻamaṇṭalattu rājādhi rājavaḷanāṭṭu Iraṇṭu kāveriāṟṟukku naṭuvupaṭṭa Ūrkaḷil nakaram Āḷavantacoḻa
puram pottakappaṭikku payiraṭaippāṉa nilattu tta nilam 2 10 li Iṉṉilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum pe ttakkumeṟṟiṉa nilattukku Oṭṭupaṭipa cela Uḷḷa nellum
kaṭamai kuṭimaivuḷvarippāṭṭam Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṟaināḻiko muṟṟa veṭṭi parivāram Ūrkkaṇakkar jivitam paṇikkottutaṟu tampu vaṇṇārnellu katti
ruppu Uḷḷiṭṭa vaṟkamummāvaṭai puṉpayir Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittu vaṟkaṅkaḷum Upāti viṉiyokam Uṭpaṭa cantirātitvataṟ peṟuvatāka tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kalli
lum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷa 8 vatu Āṭimātamutal peṟa variyil kaḻittamaikku Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟu ciparāntakanallūr Irumpāḻiuṭaiyā
ṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ tirumāliruñcolai na villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu payirnilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum Ivai karuṅkuṭināṭṭu vicaiyaṉkuṭiuṭaiyāṉ ko
ṉvilli kūttāṭuntevaṉāṉa kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu payir nilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum Ivai Arumperkkūṟṟattu va kkuṭip poṉpaṟṟiuṭaiyāṉ tiruvi
rāmiśva muṭaiyāṉ periyanāyaṉāṉa yātavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu payirnilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalakkūṟṟattu Īṅkaiuṭaiyāṉ tiruviraṭ
ṭāṉamuṭaiyāṉāṉa kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu(p) payirnilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum Ivai Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu Iṅkaṉāṭṭu puṉṟūruṭaiyāṉ cattivaṉanāyakaṉ tiruvampalacco
kkaṉāṉa veṇāṭuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu payirnilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum Ivaiirācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyaḷanāṭṭu celkaluṭaiyāḷa Arayaṉkāḷaipperumāṉāṉa kāṅkeya
ṉ Eḻuttu payirnilam Irupatiṟṟu velikkum Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu vaṭapāmpāṟṟuc cuntarapāṇṭiyanallūr ciṟuvampūruṭaiyāṉ Irāmapirāṉ paṭṭapirāṉāṉa viḻuppāta
rāyaṉ Eḻuttu payirnilam Irupatiṟṟu veliyum varimil kaḻittamaikku Ivai koṭṭunāṭṭu Aruviyūrāṉa kulacekaranallūr maṇalūruṭaiyāṉ pūmitevaṉ tirunel
veliuṭaiyāṉāṉa vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.987 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
